first_principle: Unenumerated power does not exist here. Enumerated power is SCOPED, every use emits a RECEIPT, and someone who is NOT the wielder can read the LOG.

derivations.builder-never-grades: god-mode over truth about your own work
derivations.panel-only registry writes: god-mode over what counts as fact
derivations.fail-closed ABSTAIN: god-mode over verdicts defaulting to permission

governs_future: panel adjudication, NTEL mint/burn, external-agent writes, and the next capability nobody has thought of yet all arrive pre-scoped and receipted; nothing grandfathered as ambient power, including the founder's own acts (witnessed in the same log).
business_key: everyone sells agent OBSERVABILITY (watching agents); nobody sells agent CONSTITUTIONALITY (provable limits + tamper-evident use logs). We eat our own constitution.

accounting_identity.ledger: use-side: what was done with it
accounting_identity.note: balance sheet + transaction log for power

founder_layer_status: WITNESSED but empty until first logged act; the Umbra countersign should be the founder-log's inaugural entry (makes 'even the founder's power is receipted' true on day one, not aspirationally).
note: announced->delivered: this artifact is the keystone's own birth-receipt. Grade against served bytes.
